title: 카게마사의 기억: 전멸
color_mood: 탈색, 차가움 — 설원의 흰 눈과 선명한 붉은 피의 대비

cuts.subject: 눈보라 속 사무라이 정찰대 행군
cuts.action: 카게마사가 선두에서 설원 계곡을 행군, 배후로 4~5명의 사무라이 전사 따름
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic smooth side tracking shot, samurai patrol moving through snow-covered mountain valley in blizzard, Kagemasa leading at front — samurai in deep navy oyoroi armor with gold imperial crest, wide shoulder sode, kabuto helmet with menpou demon face mask, nodachi sword at side — behind him 4 samurai soldiers spread across the rocky terrain at different depths and elevations, NOT in a line: one crouching behind a boulder left, one slightly elevated on a snow ridge right, two others at staggered distances center, each soldier has distinct armor wear patterns — one with a damaged pauldron, one shorter and stockier, one with a torn banner on his back, one older with grey beard visible under helmet — footsteps in deep snow at varying angles, overcast grey sky, cold desaturated tone, snow particles drifting, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, single cinematic frame, 1920x1080 16:9
cuts.motion_desc: Steadicam lateral track following the patrol at mid distance, slight shaky quality to suggest cold and tension

cuts.subject: 카게마사 갑옷의 황실 문장 — 금박이 벗겨진 흔적
cuts.action: 정지 — 눈 결정이 문장 위에 내려앉음
cuts.frame_prompt: Extreme close-up of Kagemasa's chest armor, deep navy lacquered oyoroi with gold imperial crest — gold flaking and worn from battle damage, snow crystals settling on the surface, cold blue light, desaturated, symbolic detail shot emphasizing duty and sacrifice, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080 16:9
cuts.motion_desc: Static macro shot, snowflakes slowly land and melt on the golden crest

cuts.subject: 바이킹 기습과 전우 전멸
cuts.action: 바위 위에서 바이킹 버서커들이 도끼를 들고 뛰어내림. 짧고 잔혹한 전투 — 사무라이 전사들이 하나둘 쓰러짐. 마지막 부하가 등 뒤에서 도끼에 쓰러짐. 눈보라가 거세짐
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic sudden handheld chaotic shot, brutal ambush in snow-covered mountain valley — Viking berserkers of wildly different builds: one enormous barrel-chested berserker with a great axe leaping from upper left rock, one wiry fast berserker with twin hatchets sliding down a snow slope right, one giant with a fur cloak and club crashing through center — all silhouetted in dramatic backlight against overcast sky, each Viking has a unique silhouette and weapon — samurai soldiers falling in the snow at different positions, Kagemasa samurai in deep navy oyoroi armor fighting at center frame, last companion falling diagonally behind him clutching his chest, blood vivid red on white snow, intense blizzard from the right, camera tilted and unstable, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, single cinematic frame, 1920x1080 16:9
cuts.motion_desc: Fast handheld shaky cam throughout combat, then sudden stillness when last ally falls — abrupt cut from chaos to silence

cuts.camera: low angle medium shot — tilt up
cuts.subject: 홀로 살아남은 카게마사의 묵념
cuts.action: 전투 후 정적. 눈보라 속 카게마사가 무릎을 꿇고 피 묻은 노다치를 눈에 꽂아 양손을 얹어 묵념. 주위에 전우들의 시체. 하얀 눈 위의 선명한 붉은 피. 카게마사의 거친 호흡만
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic low angle medium shot tilting up slowly, Kagemasa — samurai in battered deep navy oyoroi armor with gold imperial crest, kabuto helmet, menpou demon face mask — kneeling alone in snow, nodachi sword planted blade-down into snow with both hands resting on the hilt in silent prayer, fallen samurai soldiers scattered around him, vivid crimson blood spreading across white snow, blizzard winding down to silence, grey overcast sky, solitary and grief-stricken, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080 16:9
cuts.motion_desc: Camera starts at ground level looking up at Kagemasa kneeling, slowly tilts up to reveal full figure against grey sky, holds on face

cuts.subject: 눈 위의 피와 꽂힌 노다치
cuts.action: 노다치의 벚꽃 문양 칼코등이가 붉은 핏자국 위에 꽂힌 채 바람에 떨림
cuts.frame_prompt: Extreme close-up of nodachi sword blade planted in snow, cherry blossom tsuba guard visible, blood-stained blade against pure white snow with vivid crimson spreading around it, shallow depth of field, cold blue light, symbolic shot of fallen warriors and solitary survival, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080 16:9
cuts.motion_desc: Static with gentle blade vibration from wind, snow slowly fills in around the sword base

cuts.subject: 눈보라 속으로 사라지는 카게마사의 실루엣
cuts.action: 카게마사가 천천히 일어나 노다치를 짚고 서서, 폭설 속으로 한 발 한 발 걸어감. 눈보라가 화면 전체를 채우며 하얗게 페이드
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic wide static shot, Kagemasa — samurai in deep navy oyoroi armor, lone survivor — slowly rising to stand with nodachi sword, silhouette walking away into intensifying blizzard, figure gradually consumed by white snowstorm, fade to white transition, cold desaturated tone, atmosphere of grief and resolve, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080 16:9
cuts.motion_desc: Static camera holds as Kagemasa walks into blizzard, snowstorm density increases until full white-out, transition to Scene 04
